Gene expression figures

Stephanie Hickey

2026-06-19

Lab: Weiming Li

Project: BCC125_sea_lamprey_scRNA

library(tidyverse)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scater)
library(scran)
library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(readxl)
library(monocle3)
library(batchelor)
library(DT)
library(TSCAN)
library(rtracklayer)
library(BiocSingular)
library(ggforce)
library(ggraph)
library(tidygraph)
library(scatterpie)
library(ggrepel)
source(paste0(params$project_dir, "/src/scRNA_seq_functions.R"))
results_dir = paste0(params$project_dir, "/results/20260615")
data_dir    = paste0(params$project_dir, "/data")

Build combined (uncorrected) sex cell SCE

all.sex.dec  <- lapply(all.sex.sce, modelGeneVar)

universe     <- Reduce(intersect, lapply(all.sex.sce, rownames))
all.sex.sce2 <- lapply(all.sex.sce, "[", i = universe,)
all.sex.dec2 <- lapply(all.sex.dec, "[", i = universe,)

all.sex.sce2[["TM_C00004374"]]@colData$cluster = "noclust"

combined.sex.sce <- do.call(cbind, all.sex.sce2)

Add meta data

# set coldata
rownames(cell_meta) = cell_meta$barcode
cell_meta_ordered <- cell_meta[colnames(combined.sce), , drop = FALSE]
colData(combined.sce) <- DataFrame(cell_meta_ordered)

germ_cell_meta = 
  cell_meta %>%
  filter(!is.na(germ.cluster)) 

germ_cell_meta_ordered <- germ_cell_meta[colnames(combined.sex.sce), , drop = FALSE]
colData(combined.sex.sce) <- DataFrame(germ_cell_meta_ordered)


# set rowdata
rownames(gene_descriptions) = gene_descriptions$Gene
gene_descriptions_ordered = gene_descriptions[rownames(combined.sce), , drop = FALSE]
rowData(combined.sce) = DataFrame(gene_descriptions_ordered)
rowData(combined.sex.sce) = DataFrame(gene_descriptions_ordered)

Set cluster annotations and pallettes

All cells

anno = c(
  "1. Fibroblasts (migrating)",
  "2. Mesonephric cells",
  "3. Granulosa cells (migrating)",
  "4. Granulosa cells",
  "6. Endothelial cells",
  "8. Erythrocytes",
  "9. Pre-granulosa cells (migrating)",
  "10. Leukocytes",
  "11. Hemopoietic stem cells",
  "12. Podocytes",
  "13. Macrophages",
  "14. Pre-granulosa cells (mitotic)",
  "15. Immune cells (migrating, mitotic)",
  "7. Primordial germ cells (migrating)",
  "5. Oogonia/Oocytes",
  "17. Male germ cells (migrating)",
  "16. Spermatocytes (cytokinetic)",
  "18. Spermatocytes (apoptotic)",
  "19. Spermatocytes (GPCR-activated)"
)

level_order = c(1:4, 6, 8:15, 7, 5, 17, 16, 18, 19)
combined.sce$label <- factor(combined.sce$label, levels = level_order)

# Define a visible light blue and a deep dark blue from the Blues palette
start_blue <- brewer.pal(9, "Blues")[3] # #9ECAE1 (skips the two whitest shades)
end_blue   <- brewer.pal(9, "Blues")[9] # #08306B

# Generate 12 sequential shades starting from the darker base
color1_shades <- colorRampPalette(c(start_blue, end_blue))(13)

# Generate 6 distinct shades of Oranges
# Define custom boundaries for Orange to completely block the brown tones
start_org     <- "#FDBE85" # A highly visible, crisp light orange
end_org       <- "#A62B00" # A rich, intense burnt orange/terracotta (replaces the brown)

# Generate your 7 distinct, non-brown orange shades
color2_shades <- colorRampPalette(c(start_org, end_org))(6)


# Merge into your publication-ready master palette
publication_palette <- c(color1_shades, color2_shades)
publication_palette  <- setNames(publication_palette, anno)

Germ cells

# broad annotations (15 sex cell clusters)
germ_anno = c(
  "PGC",
  "Cyst.epithelial.cells",
  "FGC.migrating",
  "Oogonia.stem.cells",
  "Oogonia",
  "Oocytes",
  "MGC.SPC.group1",
  "MGC.SPC.group2",
  "MGC.SPC.group3",
  "SPC.cytokinetic"
)

combined.sex.sce$germ.broad.CellType <- factor(combined.sex.sce$germ.broad.CellType, levels = germ_anno)

# 1. Family One: 2 Shades (Gold/Amber)
# Custom anchors to guarantee a clean, high-contrast 2-step jump
color1_shades <- c("#FEC44F", "#D95F02")

# 2. Family Two: 4 Shades (Blues - skipping white/light tones)
start_blue    <- brewer.pal(9, "Blues")[4] # Clear light-medium blue
end_blue      <- brewer.pal(9, "Blues")[8] # Rich dark blue
color2_shades <- colorRampPalette(c(start_blue, end_blue))(4)

# 3. Family Three: 4 Shades (Greens - skipping white/light tones)
start_green   <- brewer.pal(9, "Greens")[4] # Vibrant light-medium green
end_green     <- brewer.pal(9, "Greens")[8] # Deep forest green
color3_shades <- colorRampPalette(c(start_green, end_green))(4)

# Combine into your final 10-color publication palette
three_group_palette <- c(color1_shades, color3_shades, color2_shades)
three_group_palette  <- setNames(three_group_palette, germ_anno)

Fig.1: All cell tSNE

level_order = c(1:4, 6, 8:15, 7, 5, 17, 16, 18, 19)
cell_meta$label = factor(cell_meta$label, levels = level_order)

cell_meta <- cell_meta %>%
  mutate(CellType = anno[as.integer(label)])  

plot_tsne(df           = cell_meta,
          color_col    = "CellType",
          label_col    = "label",
          palette      = publication_palette,
          color_levels = anno,
          point_size   = 0.5,
          text_color   = "black",
          bg_color     = "white",
          text_size    = 2)

ggsave(paste0(results_dir, "/Fig1_tsne.png"), width = 8, height = 5)

Fig. 10: WNT Genes in germ cell clusters

goi = c("WNT5B", "WNT5A-1", "WNT5B.1")

plot_violin_goi_named(sce              = combined.sex.sce,
                      markers          = germ_scatter_markers, 
                      goi              = goi, 
                      gene_description = gene_description, 
                      anno             = germ_anno,
                      palette          = three_group_palette,
                      cluster_col      = "germ.broad.CellType",
                      marker_col       = "cluster",
                      title            = NULL
                      )

ggsave(paste0(results_dir, "/Fig10_WNT_germ_cell_clusters.png"), width = 4, height = 4)

Fig.12 Wnt5 pseudotime

pseudo_mat  <- pathStat(pseudo$ordering)
goi = c("WNT5A-1", "WNT5B", "WNT5B.1", "WNT5B.2", "WNT5B.3")

plot_pseudotime_paths(sce = combined.sex.sce, 
                      pseudo_mat = pseudo_mat, 
                      goi = goi, 
                      gene_description = gene_descriptions, 
                      paths = c("Oocytes", "SPC.cytokinetic"),
                      tradeseq_res = pseudo_de,
                      title = NULL)

ggsave(paste0(results_dir, "/Fig12_WNT_pseudotime.png"), width = 5, height = 5.5)

Fig.14 Chr 81 genes

id_oi = c("LOC116957683",
          "LOC116957684",
          "LOC116957694",
          "LOC116957681",
          "LOC116957685",
          "LOC116957682",
          "LOC116957686",
          "LOC116957687",
          "LOC116957688",
          "LOC116957695",
          "LOC116957689",
          "LOC116957690",
          "LOC116957691",
          "LOC116957693",
          "LOC116957692")

goi = 
  gene_descriptions %>%
  filter(Gene %in% id_oi) %>%
  pull(WangGeneID)

plot_violin_goi(sce              = combined.sce,
                markers          = scatter_markers,
                goi              = goi,
                gene_description = gene_descriptions,
                anno             = anno,
                palette          = publication_palette,
                label_col        = "label",
                level_order      = c(1:4, 6, 8:15, 7, 5, 17, 16, 18, 19),
                title            = NULL,
                ncol             = 3)

ggsave(paste0(results_dir, "/Fig14_Chr81_genes.png"), width = 7, height = 6)

Fig. S6: CUDZ1 genes

cuzd1_genes <- c(
  "CUZD1", "CUZD1.1", "CUZD1.10", "CUZD1.11", "CUZD1.12",
  "CUZD1.13", "CUZD1.14", "CUZD1.15", "CUZD1.16", "CUZD1.2",
  "CUZD1.3", "CUZD1.4", "CUZD1.5", "CUZD1.6", "CUZD1.7",
  "CUZD1.8", "CUZD1.9"
)

plot_violin_goi(sce              = combined.sce,
                markers          = scatter_markers,
                goi              = cuzd1_genes,
                gene_description = gene_descriptions,
                anno             = anno,
                palette          = publication_palette,
                label_col        = "label",
                level_order      = c(1:4, 6, 8:15, 7, 5, 17, 16, 18, 19),
                title            = NULL,
                ncol             = 2)

ggsave(paste0(results_dir, "/S6_CUDZ1_genes.png"), width = 7, height = 8)
